creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Just some additional explanation for the logs: 
(why :-). 

as in why would it be important to move sshguard from syslog.conf to an rc boot script? 
and, what happens to legacy users who have this already installed and run portsupgrade -Rra every night? 

would it be possible to put in an options knob, default set to 'off', (and no ports bump)? so this is a no-op for people who already have it installed in syslog.conf? 

what about sshguard-pf/ipfw/ipfilter?
